Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product highlights to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual content research that would take 30+ minutes per campaign.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, and call-to-action tailored to R1 Concepts branding and audience.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email copy daily without requiring a dedicated copywriter, saving hours of creative work and maintaining consistent messaging.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot and sends it to targeted contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email delivery pipeline so campaigns go out daily on schedule, driving consistent customer engagement and repeat purchases without manual sends.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product data, brand messaging, and promotional content from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with the latest DFC inventory and offers, removing the need for manual catalog reviews before each send.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with subject line, persuasive copy, and product-specific messaging tailored to the DFC brand voice.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, high-quality email creative every day without human drafting, enabling a sustained daily cadence that would otherwise require a full-time content creator.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email in HubSpot and dispatches it to DFC contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures reliable, automated daily delivery to segmented audiences, maintaining top-of-mind awareness with DFC customers and driving consistent revenue attribution.

R1 Support Agent.action: Monitors and retrieves new or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, order history, and issue descriptions.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI immediate access to the full context of each support request, eliminating the time agents spend reading and categorizing tickets manually.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a context-aware reply using product knowledge and support best practices.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time dramatically by pre-classifying and pre-drafting replies, allowing support agents to review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, tags, and draft reply for the R1 support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support data centralized in HubSpot with consistent categorization, enabling faster resolution and better reporting on recurring issues.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that have been captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all customer issue data from Amazon packaging inserts into a single retrieval point, ensuring no return request or complaint is missed.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue and return data into a structured Google Sheets workbook for team analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, filterable view of customer issues and return patterns, enabling data-driven decisions to reduce return rates and improve product quality.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals in real time, ensuring the sales team knows exactly when an existing DFC customer is actively browsing products.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channels and email with customer activity details and recommended actions.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables sales reps to reach out while customer interest is at its peak, dramatically increasing the chance of conversion and shortening the sales cycle.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Provides a customer-facing AI chat experience on the R1 Concepts website to answer product questions, check order status, and guide purchases.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Offers 24/7 instant customer support and product guidance, reducing support ticket volume and improving the online shopping experience for R1 customers.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Processes customer questions using AI and connects to backend systems for order data, product catalog, and knowledge base lookups (integrations in development).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable real-time, accurate answers to customer inquiries without human intervention, freeing support staff to handle complex escalations only.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creator candidates that wouldn't appear in platform-only searches, expanding the discovery pool significantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves detailed creator profiles, follower counts, content themes, and engagement metrics from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds a rich, multi-platform profile for each discovered creator, giving the team a complete picture of reach and relevance without hours of manual research.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates creator data across platforms, ranks relevance to brand keywords, and produces a structured shortlist of discovery candidates.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw multi-source data into an actionable, prioritized creator list in seconds, replacing what would be days of manual vetting and spreadsheet work.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement quality, content relevance, and brand alignment.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Eliminates subjective decision-making in creator selection by applying consistent, data-driven scoring, ensuring only the highest-potential creators advance to outreach.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt libraries stored in Google Drive to inform AI-generated outreach messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand-approved messaging, maintaining consistency across hundreds of creator contacts.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and customized prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized, persuasive outreach at scale without manual drafting, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily with tailored messaging.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators via Gmail and tracks delivery and initial engagement.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the send process so outreach campaigns scale effortlessly, freeing the influencer marketing team to focus on relationship building rather than email logistics.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors Gmail inbox for creator replies, captures response content, and identifies the conversation thread and context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response falls through the cracks, enabling timely follow-up that keeps negotiations moving and demonstrates professionalism.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves past influencer email conversations, negotiation playbooks, and approved deal terms from Google Drive to inform the AI response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every AI-generated reply in real negotiation history and approved parameters, ensuring responses are realistic, on-strategy, and within budget guidelines.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware reply emails using learned negotiation patterns, previous conversation history, and creator-specific deal parameters.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles the heavy lifting of negotiation correspondence at scale, maintaining a natural conversational tone while optimizing for favorable deal terms across multiple creator threads simultaneously.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation reply to the creator via Gmail within the existing conversation thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations progressing in real time without manual drafting delays, dramatically compressing the time from initial contact to signed creator partnership.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying items.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability data, ensuring accurate weekly load sheets with zero lookup errors.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates a new marketing email in HubSpot with the formatted load sheet and accompanying sales sheet attached, then schedules or sends the Must Have Monday email.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Ensures the MHM email goes out consistently every Monday with accurate product data, driving weekly dealer engagement without manual email assembly.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Posts a notification or confirmation to the designated Teams channel when the weekly load sheet and email have been generated and sent.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team informed of weekly email status in real time, eliminating follow-up questions and ensuring accountability.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails, tailored to DFC's First to Market positioning and product details.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email content in seconds rather than hours, enabling faster time-to-market for new product announcements.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates draft marketing emails in HubSpot with the AI-generated content, sales sheet attachments, and proper formatting for review before send.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Reduces email creation from a multi-step manual process to an automated draft ready for one-click approval, accelerating product launch communications.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email engagement data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most tedious part of monthly reporting by pulling CRM metrics directly, saving the marketing team from manual HubSpot exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls website traffic, organic search performance, keyword rankings from GA4 and Search Console, plus SMS campaign metrics from Attentive.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates data from four separate platforms into a single reporting pipeline, eliminating hours of manual data gathering across tools.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with formatted charts, tables, and metrics from all collected data sources.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms raw data into presentation-ready slides automatically, delivering a polished monthly deck section without manual formatting or copy-pasting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current keyword rankings and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms compared to competitors.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Ensures every blog post targets a verified SEO opportunity rather than guessing at topics, maximizing organic traffic potential per article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for search intent with proper headings, meta descriptions, and internal linking.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale, enabling R1 Concepts to systematically close keyword gaps without hiring additional content writers.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog content to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization settings configured for maximum search visibility.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates the manual publishing workflow including Yoast configuration, ensuring consistent SEO best practices on every post without human oversight.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes vendor purchase order exports from Dream ERP, extracting PO details including vendor names, order dates, line items, and outstanding quantities.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the extraction of PO data that previously required manual ERP report pulls and spreadsheet cleanup, saving hours of data preparation weekly.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot, then triggers automated vendor chase email sequences for overdue or pending purchase orders.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Ensures no vendor PO falls through the cracks by automating follow-up emails, improving fulfillment timelines and reducing stockouts from missed communications.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number uploads and the New Availability Guide file, then runs a matching algorithm directly in the browser to identify qualifying parts.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Provides instant, offline load sheet generation without any server dependencies, enabling anyone on the team to create accurate load sheets on demand.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched results into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file with proper column headers and formatting.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a ready-to-distribute Excel load sheet in seconds, eliminating manual spreadsheet formatting and ensuring consistent output every time.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the starting template for the new week.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Bypasses the lack of an API by automating the browser directly, saving 15-20 minutes of repetitive campaign setup clicks each week.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's vehicle name in the SMS copy and sets the correct send date and time for the upcoming delivery window.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures weekly MHM SMS campaigns go out on schedule with accurate vehicle details, maintaining consistent customer engagement without manual campaign editing.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts historical sales data from Dream ERP including transaction records, customer purchase history, product performance, and order frequency.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Unlocks actionable sales intelligence from raw ERP data that would otherwise sit unused, forming the foundation for targeted customer outreach.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back cohorts, then triggers automated email campaigns including reorder reminders and cross-sell recommendations.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue by automatically re-engaging lapsed customers and prompting reorders at optimal intervals, turning dormant accounts into active buyers.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to high-value customer segments for time-sensitive promotions, reorder nudges, and win-back offers.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds an additional high-open-rate channel to the automation mix, reaching customers who may miss emails and increasing overall campaign conversion rates.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Microsoft Teams channel for new Excel file uploads from William Nguyen, detecting the weekly Super Session Saturday file.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates the need for manual file checking by automatically detecting new uploads, ensuring the Saturday email process starts without human intervention.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the detected Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a hosted download link for inclusion in the email.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Automates file hosting and link generation that would otherwise require manual HubSpot uploads, ensuring the download link is always fresh and valid.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent weekly email experience with zero manual email building, ensuring DFC's Saturday engagement program runs reliably every week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting automotive shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-specific language and search intent optimization.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Scales DFC's B2B content marketing without requiring dedicated copywriters, producing targeted articles that attract high-value commercial buyers through organic search.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated B2B blog content to DFC's WordPress site with proper categorization, formatting, and SEO metadata configured.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a consistent publishing cadence for DFC's B2B blog without manual CMS work, steadily building organic authority in the automotive aftermarket space.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Monitors the DFC YouTube channel weekly for new Friction Friday video uploads and extracts video metadata, embed URL, and transcript.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Ensures every Friction Friday episode is automatically captured and repurposed without manual tracking, saving 30+ minutes per week on content sourcing.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Generates and publishes a blog post featuring the embedded video, a written summary derived from the transcript, and SEO-optimized metadata.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Builds and sends a weekly email to the Friction Friday subscriber list featuring the new video, blog link, and a call-to-action.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Subscribers receive timely, branded email updates automatically, driving engagement and traffic back to the blog and YouTube without manual email creation.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Triggers an SMS message to opted-in contacts with a short teaser and link to the new Friction Friday content.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Reaches customers on their mobile devices with high open rates, driving immediate traffic to the latest episode and increasing multi-channel engagement.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows including site visit triggers, welcome series sequences, and enrollment criteria for inefficiencies or gaps.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken triggers, redundant steps, and missed engagement opportunities so workflows perform at peak effectiveness and no leads fall through the cracks.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Reconfigures and optimizes site visit triggers, welcome email series timing, and segmentation logic based on audit findings.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Improved workflows deliver more relevant messaging at the right time, increasing open rates, conversion rates, and overall lead nurture efficiency for R1 Concepts.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records and their unique Dream CustomerIDs from the Dream ERP system for mapping to HubSpot contacts.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a single source of truth for customer identity, enabling accurate linkage between sales/order data in Dream and marketing data in HubSpot.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps and syncs Dream CustomerIDs to corresponding HubSpot contact records via custom properties, enabling DFC sales automation workflows.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Sales automation workflows can now trigger based on real purchase and account data from Dream ERP, unlocking personalized outreach and accurate revenue attribution.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping and defining requirements, data sources, and integration architecture for the Bomb file project.

Image Mapping Project for Dream.action: Planning the architecture and mapping logic to associate product images with the correct SKUs and catalog entries in Dream ERP.

Claudia Automation.action: Defining the scope, triggers, and automation logic for the Claudia automation project during the planning stage.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Scoping the automated generation and delivery of Shirly invoice PDFs, including data inputs, template design, and distribution method.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects new weekly R1 Concepts YouTube video uploads and extracts the video title, description, embed code, and transcript.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Auto-generates an SEO-optimized blog post with the embedded video, a written recap from the transcript, and relevant product links.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Every video becomes a searchable, indexable blog post that drives organic traffic and serves as a content hub for R1 Concepts products.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Composes and sends a weekly email to the R1 subscriber list featuring the new video, blog post link, and product CTAs.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends an SMS notification to opted-in R1 contacts with a teaser and direct link to the new video or blog post.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: SMS delivers near-instant engagement with 90%+ open rates, pushing same-day traffic to the latest R1 content and maximizing reach across channels.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly search performance data for DFC blog posts including impressions, clicks, CTR, and average keyword rankings.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides clear visibility into how blog content ranks and performs in search, enabling data-driven decisions on which topics to double down on or optimize.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects traffic, engagement, and conversion metrics for DFC blog pages including sessions, time on page, and goal completions.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Reveals which blog posts drive meaningful user engagement and business conversions, tying content output directly to revenue-driving behavior.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves blog post metadata including publish dates, categories, word counts, and Yoast SEO scores for each article produced by the blog agent.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Tracks content production velocity and quality standards, ensuring the blog agent maintains consistent output with proper SEO optimization on every post.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Aggregates Yoast readability and SEO scores across all DFC blog posts to assess content quality and optimization compliance at scale.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ensures every AI-generated blog post meets SEO best practices and readability standards, maintaining brand quality while scaling content production.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly search performance data for R1 Concepts blog posts including impressions, clicks, keyword rankings, and indexing status.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives the R1 team clear insight into organic search traction, helping prioritize content topics that drive the most visibility and traffic growth.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects monthly traffic and engagement metrics for R1 blog pages including sessions, user behavior flow, and conversion events.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects blog content to downstream business outcomes, proving ROI of the blog agent and identifying which posts contribute most to product page visits and sales.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Compiles a monthly summary of published R1 blog posts including volume, categories, publish cadence, and content quality indicators.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a clear production report showing the blog agent's output consistency and efficiency, enabling stakeholders to evaluate automation ROI at a glance.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Receives incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments from the Outlook inbox.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Automatically stamps the Harbor Tires company stamp and applies Richard's digital signature to each invoice PDF.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the stamped and signed invoice PDF back to the appropriate recipient or files it in the designated folder.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks DFC prospect page visits and search engagement data to identify high-intent visitor activity.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Surfaces real-time prospect engagement signals that would otherwise go unnoticed, enabling timely outreach to warm leads.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers personalized follow-up emails within moments of a prospect's visit, dramatically increasing conversion rates by engaging leads at peak interest.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Ingests incoming customer support tickets from R1 Concepts' support channels and captures ticket details.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all customer inquiries instantly, ensuring no support request is lost or delayed in the queue.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Routes the AI-generated response back to the customer or escalates the ticket to a human agent based on confidence level.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Delivers near-instant resolutions for routine tickets while ensuring complex issues reach the right team member without bottlenecks.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance data from all paid ad channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Aggregates cross-platform ad data automatically, eliminating hours of manual data exports and consolidation every week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares this week's performance against the previous month's averages and generates a summary highlighting notable changes and anomalies.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the marketing team's inbox for review.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures every stakeholder receives a consistent, easy-to-read performance snapshot each week without anyone having to build it manually.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Extracts full-month performance data from all paid advertising channels including detailed metrics and budget utilization.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Saves the team hours of tedious data pulling at month-end by automatically gathering all required metrics in one pass.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Analyzes the monthly data and formats it into a structured report layout designed to match the end-of-month presentation slides.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Delivers the formatted monthly report to the team for final review and inclusion in end-of-month slide decks.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Streamlines the reporting handoff so the team can focus on strategy discussion rather than report assembly during month-end reviews.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Identifies customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration and exports their contact data.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls ad copy and performance metrics from all active paid social campaigns to identify underperforming creatives.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, approaching deadlines, and project status changes across active workspaces.

Asana Agent.action: Analyzes task and project data to generate a prioritized status summary highlighting blockers, overdue items, and upcoming deadlines.
Asana Agent.impact: Transforms raw project data into an intelligent briefing that surfaces the most critical action items, improving team accountability and focus.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated project status summary to relevant team members via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Ensures stakeholders receive clear, digestible project updates in their inbox without needing to context-switch into Asana.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting notes, transcripts, and action items from media team meetings held in Teams.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures no decisions or action items are lost after meetings, providing a reliable record without manual note-taking.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the raw meeting notes and context to the AI processing pipeline via email for extraction and analysis.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a seamless handoff between the meeting platform and the AI layer, maintaining a complete audit trail of meeting content.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses meeting content to extract specific action items, assign owners, set due dates, and structure them as tasks.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Automatically creates new tasks in Asana with the AI-extracted details, assigning them to the correct team members and projects.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Guarantees every meeting action item becomes a tracked, assigned task without anyone manually entering them, dramatically improving follow-through rates.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Extracts search ad copy, headlines, descriptions, and associated performance metrics from all active Google Ads campaigns.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Automates the data gathering step of ad audits, ensuring a comprehensive review of every active search ad without manual exports.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Evaluates each search ad's copy against performance thresholds and best practices, then generates specific rewrite recommendations for underperformers.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers data-driven copy improvement suggestions that would typically require a dedicated analyst, helping boost ad relevance and Quality Scores at scale.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends the complete audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy changes to the search marketing team.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Puts actionable optimization recommendations directly in front of the team, shortening the time from insight to ad copy improvement.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Pulls the latest data from the Agent Tracker sheet, including agent names, statuses, owners, and recent activity logs.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Parses the raw sheet data and formats it into a clean, human-readable weekly summary organized by status, highlights, and action items.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Receives the vehicle spec submitted via a HubSpot form (make, model, year, etc.) and queries the DFC catalog to retrieve all matching parts currently in stock.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the stocked and missing parts data into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout organized by part category and availability status.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet assembly and ensures Mark receives a professional, consistent catalog format every time.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends the formatted Excel file as an attachment to Mark's email with a summary of what was found and what's missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of form submission, replacing what previously took hours of manual research.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the manual lookup process that previously required a dozen people doing independent searches across the system, consolidating all statuses instantly.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no sourcing path, and categorizes each line by resolution status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team a single prioritized view of all backorders with clear flags on which parts need escalation, cutting triage time dramatically.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder status category, including ETAs for in-transit parts and alternative options for dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Automates customer-facing updates that previously required individual outreach per order, dramatically improving response time and customer satisfaction.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract two-piece rotor listings organized by make, model, and year fitment.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates hours of manual catalog research across three competitor sites, ensuring comprehensive and up-to-date fitment data in one collection pass.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and gaps in coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where market opportunities exist, giving Dino a clear roadmap for inventory expansion.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments where DFC has gaps or new market potential.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates real customer demand before committing to new inventory, reducing risk and ensuring data-driven stocking decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, actionable output that combines competitor intelligence, internal inventory status, and customer demand — ready for decision-making.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every creative including headlines, descriptions, and CTA fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually open and review each ad across multiple platforms, covering hundreds of active creatives in seconds.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for the specified phrases or keywords and compiles a flagged list showing the exact campaign, ad, field, and copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims instantly — preventing costly ad violations or brand inconsistencies before they escalate.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list to the requester with each match organized by platform, campaign, and specific copy field for easy review and action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report on demand, enabling the team to resolve flagged copy issues immediately without digging through ad managers.
